# PERF-105 positive: runtime.SetFinalizer on a hot-path object
lang: go
file: PERF-105-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "runtime"

type Buffer struct {
	data []byte
}

func MakeBuffer() *Buffer {
	b := &Buffer{}
	runtime.SetFinalizer(b, (*Buffer).Release)
	return b
}

func (b *Buffer) Release() {}
